properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I’m down and feeling so empty When my eyes are full of tears because of pains When I’m helpless, broken into pieces Yet I know You are always there for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Though there are times I suffer from heartaches And my soul is pierced with sorrows and griefs Fears and worries overflow inside me Yet my heart still trusts in You my Lord my King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the Calm of my storm You are my Hiding Place I trust in Your unfailing love You are the Refuge of my soul You are my Shelter and my Shield I give You my hidden heart And all the things that I can’t bear

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I Hold on to Your love and kindness You comfort me and mend these broken wings Father here I am searching and longing In You alone, I will dwell in Your promises

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are the Refuge of my soul You are my Shelter and my Shield I give You my hidden heart And all the things that I can’t bear
